The '''Auril systems''' were a group of six [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] located within the [[Auril sector/Legends|Auril sector]]. The group had included three other [[Star/Legends|star]] systems before the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]], however, these three were destroyed in a multiple [[Supernova/Legends|supernova]] during the war.

{{System-stub}}
